content: Top 3 Region Managers (RM) aur unki overall annual sales ka muqabla (comparison) chart dikhao.

Top 3 Region Managers (RM) ki jagah sirf 2 Region Managers (RM) ki data available hai. RM - KHI - 1 ki annual sales lagbhag 2835245668 rupees hai, jabke RM - KHI - 2 ki annual sales lagbhag 625509918 rupees hai.
sql:
SELECT 
  r.name AS "Region Manager Name", 
  SUM(ms.total_amount) AS "Total Annual Sales"
FROM 
  master_sale ms
  JOIN regions r ON ms.region_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', r.name, '%')
GROUP BY 
  r.name
ORDER BY 
  "Total Annual Sales" DESC
LIMIT 3;

content: Show me un Area Managers ki list jin ke 'Visits' pichlay mahine barhay hain, lekin 'Sales' (Revenue) neechay gayi hai
MAUZ ke area manager ki visits pichlay mahine ke muqable is mahine barh gayi hain, lekin unki sales (revenue) neechay gayi hai, jo ke pichlay mahine 687810 rupees thi, ab 684270 rupees ho gayi hai.
sql:
WITH area_manager_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "previous_month_visits",
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "current_month_visits"
  FROM 
    "master_sale" 
  WHERE 
    "customer_type" = 'Doctors'
  GROUP BY 
    "area_manager_name"
),
area_manager_sales AS (
  SELECT 
    "area_manager_name", 
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1 THEN "total_amount" ELSE 0 END) AS "previous_month_sales",
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(MONTH FROM "invoice_date") = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) THEN "total_amount" ELSE 0 END) AS "current_month_sales"
  FROM 
    "master_sale" 
  WHERE 
    "customer_type" = 'Doctors'
  GROUP BY 
    "area_manager_name"
)
SELECT 
  amv."area_manager_name",
  amv."previous_month_visits",
  amv."current_month_visits",
  ams."previous_month_sales",
  ams."current_month_sales"
FROM 
  area_manager_visits amv
JOIN 
  area_manager_sales ams ON amv."area_manager_name" = ams."area_manager_name"
WHERE 
  amv."current_month_visits" > amv."previous_month_visits"
  AND ams."current_month_sales" < ams."previous_month_sales";

content: MAUZ ke area manager ki sales kam hone ke kai wajahein ho sakti hain. Pehli wajah yeh ho sakti hai ke MAUZ ke area manager ke ilaqe mein doctors ki visits toh barhi hain lekin unse sales (revenue) generate nahi ho raha, ya phir MAUZ ke area manager ke products ki demand kam ho gayi hai, ya phir competition badh gaya hai.
sql:
SELECT 
  "area_manager_name", 
  SUM("total_amount") AS "Total Sales"
FROM 
  master_sale 
WHERE 
  customer_type = 'Doctors'
  AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE) - 1
GROUP BY 
  "area_manager_name"
ORDER BY 
  "Total Sales" DESC
LIMIT 10;

content: Agar main 'Karachi' area mein 'Antibiotics' product group par visits ki frequency double (2x) kar doon, tou meri aglay quarter ki prediction kya hogi?
Agar main 'Karachi' area mein 'Antibiotics' product group par visits ki frequency double (2x) kar doon, tou meri aglay quarter ki prediction kya hogi?

Agar aap 'Karachi' area mein 'Antibiotics' product group par visits ki frequency double kar dete hain, toh aapki sales (revenue) bhi increase ho sakti hai, lekin exact prediction ke liye humein aur data ki zaroorat hogi, jaise ke 'Antibiotics' product group ki current sales aur market demand.
sql:
WITH 
-- Monthly trend of Antibiotics in Karachi for Simulation
antibiotics_karachi AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM 
    master_sale 
  WHERE 
    product_group_name ILIKE '%Antibiotic%' 
    AND area_name ILIKE '%Karachi%'
  GROUP BY 
    1
),
-- Double visit frequency simulation (2x growth assumption)
simulated_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    month_number,
    total_revenue * 2 AS simulated_revenue
  FROM 
    antibiotics_karachi
),
-- Extrapolate to next quarter
next_quarter_projection AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(simulated_revenue) AS projected_revenue
  FROM 
    simulated_growth
  WHERE 
    month_number >= EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
  projected_revenue AS next_quarter_prediction
FROM 
  next_quarter_projection;

content: Agar main 'KHI' area mein 'Product Group 1' par visits ki frequency double kar doon, tou meri prediction kya hogi?

Agar aap 'KHI' area mein 'Product Group 1' par visits ki frequency double kar dete hain, toh aapki aglay quarter ki prediction 5823376420 rupees ki hogi, jo kaafi bari increase hai. Yeh increase visits ki frequency double karne se expected hai, lekin exact results market demand aur competition ke basis par vary kar sakte hain.
sql:
WITH 
-- Monthly trend of Product Group 1 in KHI for Simulation
product_group_khi AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM 
    master_sale 
  WHERE 
    product_group_name ILIKE '%Product Group 1%' 
    AND area_name ILIKE '%KHI%'
  GROUP BY 
    1
),
-- Double visit frequency simulation (2x growth assumption)
simulated_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    month_number,
    total_revenue * 2 AS simulated_revenue
  FROM 
    product_group_khi
),
-- Extrapolate to next quarter
next_quarter_projection AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(simulated_revenue) AS projected_revenue
  FROM 
    simulated_growth
  WHERE 
    month_number >= EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
  projected_revenue AS next_quarter_prediction
FROM 
  next_quarter_projection;

content: Agar main 'KHI' area mein 'Product Group 2' par visits ki frequency double kar doon, tou meri prediction kya hogi?

Agar aap 'KHI' area mein 'Product Group 2' par visits ki frequency double kar dete hain, toh aapki prediction zero hai. Yah result is liye hai kyunki hamare database mein 'Product Group 2' ke liye relevant data available nahi hai, jis wajah se hum next quarter ki prediction nahi kar sakte.
sql:
WITH 
-- Monthly trend of Product Group 2 in KHI for Simulation
product_group_khi AS (
  SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM invoice_date) AS month_number,
    SUM(total_amount) AS total_revenue
  FROM 
    master_sale 
  WHERE 
    product_group_name ILIKE '%Product Group 2%' 
    AND area_name ILIKE '%KHI%'
  GROUP BY 
    1
),
-- Double visit frequency simulation (2x growth assumption)
simulated_growth AS (
  SELECT 
    month_number,
    total_revenue * 2 AS simulated_revenue
  FROM 
    product_group_khi
),
-- Extrapolate to next quarter
next_quarter_projection AS (
  SELECT 
    SUM(simulated_revenue) AS projected_revenue
  FROM 
    simulated_growth
  WHERE 
    month_number >= EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
)
SELECT 
  projected_revenue AS next_quarter_prediction
FROM 
  next_quarter_projection;
